title: GTM AI Operator
must_haves: 2-4 years in RevOps / GTM Ops / Growth / Sales Operations
Hands-on experience shipping AI/LLM-powered workflows in production
Build agentic workflows with Claude Code, n8n, AI Studio, GitHub
Working knowledge of CRM and sales engagement tools (Salesforce, Outreach)
Builder-first, hands-on (not advisory); SQL a plus
met_strengths: Directly building agentic workflows with Claude Code — matches the core tool stack and 'builder-first' framing exactly
GTM background: led go-to-market, lifecycle/segmentation, $4.5m presale, growth experiments
Years (~6.4) comfortably above the 2-4 band; UK auth, London
Large company so a generalist GTM+AI operator is more accessible than a startup FDE
Career-break agents work (competitor-intel, growth-experiments) maps to GTM automation
one_line_verdict: Strongest fit on the slice — exact Claude Code agentic-GTM tool match plus a real GTM/growth operator background, no hard blockers, at an accessible large company; only gap is formal RevOps/CRM-ops tooling depth.
fetch_note: Confirmed open via Ashby (job-board/Deel, slug f525355a) and LinkedIn (entry-level, ~36 applicants, posted ~3 wks). Requirements: 2-4 yrs GTM/RevOps + production AI/LLM workflows, Claude Code/n8n stack, CRM knowledge.
